title: Explain Help
short_answer: HELP is the app manual that the assistant can search and explain.
text: HELP is the internal manual of the assistant. It explains app folders, files, blocks, commands, runtime files, and troubleshooting topics using saved JSON entries instead of guessing.

title: Explain Info
short_answer: INFO is the general explanation area inside HELP.
text: INFO contains general explanations that are not tied to only one app block. It is used for overview topics, examples, glossary ideas, troubleshooting, and roadmap notes.

title: Explain Manual
short_answer: Manual means saved explanation that helps the assistant describe the app.
text: The manual is not random documentation. It is structured help content that the assistant can search when the user asks what a folder, file, command, or system block means.

title: Explain Guide
short_answer: A guide explains what to do, not only what something means.
text: A guide gives practical direction. In this app, guide entries should explain what a block does, where it lives, what command to try, and what file to check when something fails.

title: Explain Topic
short_answer: A topic is one explainable subject inside HELP.
text: A topic should be specific. Good topics are words like memory, llm, runtime, qdrant, scripts, logs, prompts, or settings. Each important app word should have its own explain entry.

title: Explain Keyword
short_answer: A keyword is the main word that triggers one HELP explanation.
text: A keyword should be precise and stable. Version 2.0 should avoid many aliases and instead give important folders, files, and concepts their own clear keyword.

title: Explain Alias
short_answer: An alias is an alternate name for a HELP topic, but it should be rare.
text: Aliases should not become a messy pile of possible names. In this HELP version, each explain topic should usually have one main alias, or two only when the second word is truly necessary.

title: Explain Folder
short_answer: A folder groups related files inside the app or HELP system.
text: Folders are important because the assistant project is modular. Any folder that represents a real block should have an explain entry so the user can understand what lives there and why.

title: Explain File
short_answer: A file owns a specific piece of logic, data, settings, or runtime state.
text: Important files should have explain entries. A good file explanation says what the file does, who uses it, whether it is config, code, runtime state, or saved help content.

title: Explain Json
short_answer: JSON is structured text used by the app for saved data and help entries.
text: In HELP, JSON files store explainable topics. In runtime, JSON files store current state. In settings and memory, JSON-style structures help keep data predictable and readable.
